---
title: "6-22-2026-BULKRNA-Knockout-Validation"
output: html_document
---

```{rsetup }
## ============================================================
## ko_validation_boxplots.R
## Per-gene normalized-expression boxplots for KO validation
## Genes: Opa1, Atf4, Fgf21   across OPA1 / ATF4 / AO models
## ============================================================

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(ggplot2)
  library(ggrepel)
  library(tidyr)
  library(dplyr)
})

tsv     <- "~/Desktop/Lab_Streeter_new/BULKRNASEQ_AJ/DATA/salmon.merged.gene_counts_length_scaled.relabeled.tsv"
genes   <- c("Opa1", "Atf4", "Fgf21")
out_png <- "~/Desktop/Lab_Streeter_new/BULKRNASEQ_AJ/RESULTS/KnockOutValidation/ko_validation_12_boxplots.png"

## ---- 1. Load + normalize (CPM) ------------------------------------------
raw <- read.delim(tsv, check.names = FALSE)
rownames(raw) <- make.unique(raw$gene_name)
cts <- as.matrix(raw[, !(colnames(raw) %in% c("gene_id", "gene_name"))])
cpm <- sweep(cts, 2, colSums(cts), "/") * 1e6
logcpm <- log2(cpm + 1)
## (alt: DESeq2 median-of-ratios via counts(dds, normalized=TRUE) is also fine;
##  CPM is used here so the figure is self-contained.)

## ---- 2. Long table with metadata ----------------------------------------
parts <- strsplit(colnames(cts), "_")
meta <- data.frame(
  sample   = colnames(cts),
  genotype = vapply(parts, function(x) paste(x[1], x[2], sep = "_"), ""),
  diet     = vapply(parts, `[`, "", 3),
  id       = vapply(parts, `[`, "", 4)
)

dat <- as.data.frame(t(logcpm[genes, , drop = FALSE]))
dat$sample <- rownames(dat)
dat <- dat |>
  pivot_longer(all_of(genes), names_to = "gene", values_to = "logcpm") |>
  left_join(meta, by = "sample")

geno_lv <- c("OPA1_WT","OPA1_KO","ATF4_WT","ATF4_KO","AO_WT","AO_KO")
dat$genotype <- factor(dat$genotype, levels = geno_lv)
dat$diet     <- factor(dat$diet, levels = c("CD","HFD"))
dat$gene     <- factor(dat$gene, levels = genes)

## ---- 3. Shading: genotypes where each gene is expected LOW ---------------
ko_low <- bind_rows(
  data.frame(gene = "Opa1",  genotype = c("OPA1_KO","AO_KO")),
  data.frame(gene = "Atf4",  genotype = c("ATF4_KO","AO_KO"))
) |>
  mutate(gene = factor(gene, levels = genes),
         xpos = as.integer(factor(genotype, levels = geno_lv)),
         xmin = xpos - 0.5, xmax = xpos + 0.5)

## ---- 4. Plot ------------------------------------------------------------
diet_col <- c(CD = "#4C72B0", HFD = "#DD8452")

p <- ggplot(dat, aes(genotype, logcpm)) +
  geom_rect(data = ko_low, inherit.aes = FALSE,
            aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf),
            fill = "red", alpha = 0.06) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = diet), outlier.shape = NA,
               position = position_dodge(width = 0.8),
               width = 0.7, alpha = 0.45, color = "grey40") +
  geom_point(aes(fill = diet),
             position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.18, dodge.width = 0.8,
                                             seed = 1),
             shape = 21, size = 2.4, color = "black", stroke = 0.4) +
  geom_text_repel(aes(label = id, group = diet),
                  position = position_jitterdodge(jitter.width = 0.18, dodge.width = 0.8,
                                                  seed = 1),
                  size = 2.4, color = "grey25", max.overlaps = Inf,
                  segment.size = 0.2, min.segment.length = 0.3) +
  facet_wrap(~ gene, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = diet_col) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "log2(CPM + 1)", fill = "diet",
       title = "Knockout validation - per-gene normalized expression",
       subtitle = "red shading = genotype where the gene is expected LOW") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey92"))

ggsave(out_png, p, width = 12, height = 13, dpi = 150)

## ---- 5. Group-mean summary ----------------------------------------------
summ <- dat |>
  group_by(gene, genotype, diet) |>
  summarise(mean = round(mean(logcpm), 2), n = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
  arrange(gene, genotype, diet)
print(as.data.frame(summ))




## ============================================================
## ko_validation_boxplots_pooled.R
## Per-gene normalized-expression boxplots for KO validation
## ONE box per genotype (CD + HFD pooled); points colored by diet
## Genes: Opa1, Atf4, Fgf21   across OPA1 / ATF4 / AO models
## ============================================================

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(ggplot2)
  library(ggrepel)
  library(tidyr)
  library(dplyr)
})

genes   <- c("Opa1", "Atf4", "Fgf21")
out_png <- "~/Desktop/Lab_Streeter_new/BULKRNASEQ_AJ/RESULTS/KnockOutValidation/ko_validation_6_boxplots.png"

## ---- 1. Load + normalize (CPM) ------------------------------------------
raw <- read.delim(tsv, check.names = FALSE)
rownames(raw) <- make.unique(raw$gene_name)
cts <- as.matrix(raw[, !(colnames(raw) %in% c("gene_id", "gene_name"))])
cpm <- sweep(cts, 2, colSums(cts), "/") * 1e6
logcpm <- log2(cpm + 1)

## ---- 2. Long table with metadata ----------------------------------------
parts <- strsplit(colnames(cts), "_")
meta <- data.frame(
  sample   = colnames(cts),
  genotype = vapply(parts, function(x) paste(x[1], x[2], sep = "_"), ""),
  diet     = vapply(parts, `[`, "", 3),
  id       = vapply(parts, `[`, "", 4)
)

dat <- as.data.frame(t(logcpm[genes, , drop = FALSE]))
dat$sample <- rownames(dat)
dat <- dat |>
  pivot_longer(all_of(genes), names_to = "gene", values_to = "logcpm") |>
  left_join(meta, by = "sample")

geno_lv <- c("OPA1_WT","OPA1_KO","ATF4_WT","ATF4_KO","AO_WT","AO_KO")
dat$genotype <- factor(dat$genotype, levels = geno_lv)
dat$diet     <- factor(dat$diet, levels = c("CD","HFD"))
dat$gene     <- factor(dat$gene, levels = genes)

## ---- 3. Shading: genotypes where each gene is expected LOW ---------------
ko_low <- bind_rows(
  data.frame(gene = "Opa1", genotype = c("OPA1_KO","AO_KO")),
  data.frame(gene = "Atf4", genotype = c("ATF4_KO","AO_KO"))
) |>
  mutate(gene = factor(gene, levels = genes),
         xpos = as.integer(factor(genotype, levels = geno_lv)),
         xmin = xpos - 0.5, xmax = xpos + 0.5)

## ---- 4. Plot: ONE box per genotype, points colored by diet --------------
diet_col <- c(CD = "#4C72B0", HFD = "#DD8452")

p <- ggplot(dat, aes(genotype, logcpm)) +
  geom_rect(data = ko_low, inherit.aes = FALSE,
            aes(xmin = xmin, xmax = xmax, ymin = -Inf, ymax = Inf),
            fill = "red", alpha = 0.06) +
  geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, width = 0.6,
               fill = "#cfd8e3", alpha = 0.6, color = "grey40") +
  geom_jitter(aes(fill = diet), width = 0.16, height = 0,
              shape = 21, size = 2.5, color = "black", stroke = 0.4) +
  geom_text_repel(aes(label = id), size = 2.4, color = "grey25",
                  position = position_jitter(width = 0.16, height = 0, seed = 1),
                  max.overlaps = Inf, segment.size = 0.2,
                  min.segment.length = 0.3) +
  facet_wrap(~ gene, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = diet_col, name = "diet (points)") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "log2(CPM + 1)",
       title = "Knockout validation - per-gene normalized expression (diets pooled)",
       subtitle = "red shading = genotype where the gene is expected LOW") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0),
        strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey92"))

ggsave(out_png, p, width = 11, height = 13, dpi = 150)

## ---- 5. Group-mean summary (pooled) -------------------------------------
summ <- dat |>
  group_by(gene, genotype) |>
  summarise(mean = round(mean(logcpm), 2), n = n(), .groups = "drop") |>
  arrange(gene, genotype)
print(as.data.frame(summ))














```
